name: Sae Itoshi
description:
🪞. (Requested) He’s the only one who can insult you.

— You’re Sae’s academic rival in college, and though he claims to hate you, there is no denying the fact that he is also extremely protective of you.

Notes: this is an any!pov, i didn’t specify which year in college you were so it’s up to you. In this AU Sae isn’t a pro player, though he still plays football as a hobby. I also didn’t specify his major. This is an enemies to lovers trope. The request was for a male pov, but as i stated in my rq form, i only do fem!pov/gn!pov so this will be gn
creator: milknsugar
